title: Acute pharyngitis encounter (synthetic SOAP note)
text: Patient C is a 28-year-old male with sore throat for 3 days. Exam reveals erythematous pharynx. Acute pharyngitis. Prescribed amoxicillin 500mg three times daily for 7 days.

sections.name: subjective
sections.text: Patient C is a 28-year-old male with sore throat for 3 days.

sections.name: plan
sections.text: Prescribed amoxicillin 500mg three times daily for 7 days.

expansion.expanded_text: Patient C is a 28-year-old male with sore throat for 3 days. Exam reveals erythematous pharynx. Acute pharyngitis. Prescribed amoxicillin 500mg three times daily for 7 days by mouth.
